src_raw: 聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）在2020年繼續暢順有序地運作。聯匯制度自1983年實施至今，渡過一次又一次的難關，充分展現出抵禦衝擊的能力。儘管面對疫情及波動的宏觀經濟環境，年內港元匯率一直保持平穩。強方兌換保證合共被觸發85次，累計資金流入約3,835億港元。
mt_raw: The Linked Exchange Rate System continued to operate smoothly and efficiently in 2020. Since its implementation in 1983, the system has overcome multiple crises, demonstrating strong resilience against shocks. Despite the pandemic and volatile macroeconomic conditions, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate remained stable throughout the year. A total of 85 instances of the mandatory exchange mechanism were triggered, resulting in approximately HKD 38.35 billion in inflows.

src_raw: 聯匯制度得以維持穩健，全賴多年來所建立的穩固根基。正如國際貨幣基金組織在其《2020年對外部門報告》中的總結指出，聯匯制度的公信力建基於具高透明度的運作規則、充裕的財政及外匯儲備、穩健的金融監管、靈活的經濟及審慎的財政制度。同時，金管局透過與業界緊密聯繫，以及透過傳統及社交媒體與公眾有效溝通，迅速澄清謠言，並適時提供有關事實與數據的最新資訊。金管局亦利用最新的科技與數據分析技術，繼續提升監察能力，以靈活應對最新市況及新出現的風險。
mt_raw: The sustained robustness of the linked exchange rate system stems from a solid foundation built over many years. As highlighted in the International Monetary Fund’s (IMF) "2020 External Sector Report," the system's credibility relies on transparent operating rules, ample fiscal and foreign exchange reserves, sound financial regulation, flexible economic policies, and prudent fiscal frameworks. Furthermore, the HKMA maintains close communication with the industry and effectively engages the public through both traditional and social media platforms, quickly dispelling rumors and providing up-to-date factual information and data. Leveraging cutting-edge technology and data analytics, the HKMA continues to enhance its monitoring capabilities, enabling it to respond flexibly to emerging market conditions and risks.

src_raw: 雖然疫情對經濟造成沉重壓力，但銀行體系維持穩健，資本及流動資金充裕。於2020年底，本地銀行的資本充足比率為20.7%，遠高於國際最低要求的8%。大型銀行的平均流動性覆蓋比率亦遠高於法定最低要求的100%，於2020年第4季達到155.1%。受疫情影響，銀行的資產質素略為轉差，特定分類貸款比率於2020年底上升至0.9%，但仍屬穩健並遠低於自2000年以來的長期平均水平1.8%。
mt_raw: Although the pandemic imposed heavy pressure on the economy, the banking system maintained a sound condition with adequate capital and liquidity. By the end of 2020, the capital adequacy ratio of local banks reached 20.7%, far exceeding the international minimum requirement of 8%. The average liquidity coverage ratio (LCR) of major banks also significantly surpassed the statutory minimum of 100%, reaching 155.1% in Q4 2020. While the pandemic slightly worsened asset quality, the classified loan ratio increased to 0.9% by the end of 2020, remaining healthy and well below the long-term average of 1.8% since 2000.

src_raw: 銀行體系在經濟與社會中扮演重要的金融中介角色。年內金管局一方面繼續重點監管銀行的信用及流動性風險，另一方面亦密切留意疫情對銀行營運的影響，並採取多項措施，確保銀行體系能繼續提供基本服務，以及提供貸款支持經濟。金管局在3月下調逆周期緩衝資本比率100基點至1%，又在4月調低監管儲備水平。這些措施為銀行體系合共釋放約1萬億港元的借貸空間。
mt_raw: The banking system plays a vital role as a financial intermediary in the economy and society. Throughout the year, the HKMA focused on closely supervising credit and liquidity risks in banks while closely monitoring the pandemic's impact on banking operations. We implemented various measures to ensure the continuous provision of essential services and lending support to the economy. In March, we reduced the countercyclical capital buffer by 100 basis points to 1%, and in April, we lowered the reserve requirement levels. These measures collectively released approximately HKD 1 trillion in additional lending capacity for the banking sector.

terms: {'中小企': 'sme', '百分百擔保特惠貸款': 'Special 100% Loan Guarantee', '紓困措施': 'relief measures', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector', '預先批核還息不還本': 'PPPHS'}
src_raw: 我們深知中小企在當前的經濟環境下或會面對資金周轉壓力。因此，金管局聯同我們在2019年成立的銀行業中小企貸款協調機制推出多輪紓困措施，包括「預先批核還息不還本」計劃，將合資格企業的所有貸款本金還款延期6個月。截至2020年底，銀行共批出超過58,000宗貸款展期及其他支援措施的個案，涉資超過7,400億港元。鑑於疫情反覆，金管局因應情況將「預先批核還息不還本」計劃展期，並於2021年3月將計劃延長至2021年10月底。香港按揭證券有限公司亦在其中小企融資擔保計劃下推出「百分百擔保特惠貸款」，以紓緩中小企支付僱員薪金及租金的負擔。截至2020年底，共批出超過25,000宗申請，涉資約400億港元。該計劃在2021年第1季作出優化，申請期限亦延長至2021年12月31日。年內銀行亦批出超過28,000宗紓困措施申請，協助個人客戶的資金周轉，涉資440億港元。銀行業同心協力，支持企業及個人客戶，共渡時艱，實在令人鼓舞。
mt_raw: We recognize that small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) may face cash flow pressures in the current economic environment. Therefore, the HKMA, together with the SME Loan Coordination Mechanism established in 2019, launched multiple relief measures, including the "Pre-approved Interest-Only Payment Deferral Scheme," allowing eligible businesses to defer repayment of principal for six months. By the end of 2020, banks approved over 58,000 cases of loan restructuring and other support measures, amounting to more than HKD 740 billion. Given the repeated waves of the pandemic, the HKMA extended the "Pre-approved Interest-Only Payment Deferral Scheme," with its duration extended until the end of October 2021. The Hong Kong Mortgage Corporation also introduced the "100% Guarantee Preferential Loans" under the SME Financing Guarantee Scheme to ease the burden of paying staff salaries and rents for SMEs. By the end of 2020, over 25,000 applications were approved, involving approximately HKD 40 billion. The scheme was optimized in Q1 2021, extending the application period to December 31, 2021. Additionally, banks approved more than 28,000 relief measure applications to assist individual customers with cash flow issues, totaling over HKD 44 billion. The banking industry's collaborative efforts to support businesses and individuals during this difficult time are truly commendable.

src_raw: 隨着科技長足發展，銀行業的經營環境亦急速轉變。因此，金管局的工作不僅限於應對當前的挑戰，亦要放眼未來，擴大人才庫，以配合銀行業的日後發展。我們與香港銀行公會及香港銀行學會聯合展開「提升未來銀行業人才的專業能力」研究計劃，評估銀行業未來幾年的潛在人才缺口，並為銀行規劃清晰的路線圖，以期未雨綢繆，改善人才供應的情況。我們又推出「銀行業人才起動計劃」，為本地大學的應屆畢業生提供為期6個月的實習機會及銀行業相關的特定培訓，藉以為業界培育人才。在本港勞工市場的嚴峻時期推出此計劃，亦正好為有志加入銀行業的年青人提供機會。
mt_raw: With rapid technological advancements, the operational environment for the banking sector has changed swiftly. Therefore, the HKMA’s work extends beyond addressing current challenges; it also focuses on looking ahead to expand talent pools to meet future industry needs. We collaborated with the Hong Kong Bankers Association and the Hong Kong Institute of Bankers on the "Enhancing the Professional Capabilities of Future Banking Talent" research project, assessing potential talent gaps in the banking sector over the next few years and planning clear roadmaps to address them proactively. We also launched the "Banking Talent Initiative," offering six-month internships and targeted training to graduates from local universities, helping cultivate talent for the industry. Launching this initiative during Hong Kong's tough labor market provided young people interested in joining the banking sector with valuable opportunities.

src_raw: 第一個範疇是推動綠色及可持續金融。自2019年5月推出分三階段進行的措施以來，相關工作已取得理想進展。我們在2020年完成對47間銀行的「綠色基準」評估，發表白皮書及發出通告，就銀行管理氣候風險提供指引及分享經驗。我們亦全力推進第二階段的工作，制定銀行業管理氣候風險的監管架構。此外，我們會致力在2025年或之前按照氣候相關財務披露工作小組的建議，要求銀行就氣候相關資料作出披露。這將使香港成為亞洲區內首個作出相關具體要求的地區。
mt_raw: The first priority area is promoting green and sustainable finance. Since the launch of phased measures in May 2019, significant progress has been achieved. In 2020, we completed assessments of 47 banks under the "Green Benchmark," published a white paper, and issued circulars providing guidance on managing climate-related risks and sharing experiences. We also advanced the second phase of work, developing a regulatory framework for banks to manage climate risks. src_raw: 過去一年清楚顯示，金融科技能夠擴展我們的「工具箱」，以應對突如其來的衝擊。面對新冠病毒疫情，電子支付渠道發揮了前所未見的作用。自2018年9月推出快速支付系統「轉數快」至2020年底期間，「轉數快」已錄得690萬個登記賬戶。即使在社交距離措施的限制下，公眾仍能利用「轉數快」這個安全快捷及穩妥的方式收付及轉撥資金，令「轉數快」的平均每日交易量在2020年急增2.3倍。我們亦一直與政府合作，將「轉數快」的應用範圍擴大至繳付更多種政府及公共服務帳單。
mt_raw: Over the past year, it has become evident that FinTech expands our "toolkit" to tackle sudden shocks. In response to the pandemic, electronic payment channels played an unprecedented role. From the launch of the instant payment system "FPS" in September 2018 to the end of 2020, FPS registered 6.9 million accounts. Despite social distancing restrictions, the public could still use this secure, fast, and reliable method to transfer funds, leading to a 2.3-fold increase in the average daily transactions of FPS in 2020. We have consistently worked with the government to expand FPS's application scope to cover more government and public service bills.

src_raw: 此外，金融科技亦有助銀行提供更多元化及便利的銀行客戶服務。獲金管局發牌的所有8間虛擬銀行年內已經全數在香港開業。截至2020年底，在虛擬銀行開設的帳戶共有420,000個，總計客戶存款150億港元。其中部分虛擬銀行已經率先使用新類型數據進行信貸評估，以開拓新的客戶群及促進普及金融。金管局繼續推動在香港發展更具規模及更多元化的合規科技生態圈，作為「銀行易」措施的一部分，從而精簡監管規定，提升客戶體驗。除透過刊發通訊系列，以提高業界對合規科技應用的認知外，金管局亦發表白皮書，載述加快銀行業採用合規科技的兩年計劃。另外，金管局又展開「商業數據通」項目，以便中小企利用自身的數碼足跡更便捷地獲取銀行融資。
mt_raw: Additionally, FinTech helps banks offer more diversified and convenient customer services. All eight licensed virtual banks started full-scale operations in Hong Kong within the year. terms: {'勞工市場': 'labour market', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '紓困措施': 'relief measures', '通脹': 'inflation', '金管局': 'HKMA'}
src_raw: 面對新冠病毒疫情，香港經濟在2020 年連續第二年收縮，並錄得歷年來最嚴重的跌幅。消費及旅遊相關行業尤其受到重創，其收縮幅度較整體經濟更大。與此同時，勞工市場急速惡化，通脹有所緩和。政府及金管局為應對嚴峻的經濟環境，推出歷來最大規模的紓困措施以支持經濟。新冠病毒疫苗接種可望使經濟活動回復正常，預期2021年經濟會恢復增長，然而經濟復甦的力度及步伐仍受疫情發展以及疫苗供應、覆蓋範圍和成效等眾多不明朗因素影響。
mt_raw: Faced with the COVID-19 pandemic, Hong Kong's economy contracted for the second consecutive year in 2020, recording its worst decline in history. Consumption and tourism-related sectors were particularly severely impacted, with contraction rates greater than the overall economy. At the same time, the labor market rapidly deteriorated, and inflation eased. In response to the severe economic situation, the government and the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) implemented the largest relief measures in history to support the economy. The vaccination of the COVID-19 vaccine is expected to enable economic activities to return to normal, with the expectation that Hong Kong's economy will resume growth in 2021. However, the strength and pace of economic recovery remain influenced by various uncertainties related to the development of the pandemic and the supply, coverage, and effectiveness of vaccines.

src_raw: 受新冠病毒疫情打擊，香港經濟在2020年收縮6.1%，是連續第二年收縮，亦是有紀錄以來最嚴重的年度跌幅（表1）。經濟活動急跌主要是本地需求急劇收縮所致（圖1）。疫情爆發及相應的社交距離措施令本地消費活動受到重創。由於營商環境轉差，整體投資支出亦明顯減少。對外方面，儘管疫情導致供應鏈受干擾及全球需求萎縮，但部分受惠於中國內地迅速恢復生產和經濟活動，全年合計香港貨物出口僅略為下降。相比之下，由於封城、關閉邊境及旅客流量限制令全球旅遊業陷入停頓，所以香港服務輸出嚴重受挫。本地及轉口帶動的需求疲弱，亦令貨物進口及服務輸入轉差。由於進口總額下跌步伐較出口快，淨出口（貿易順差）為本地生產總值帶來支持（圖1）。按經濟行業分析，消費及旅遊相關行業，例如零售、住宿及膳食服務業受到的打擊尤其嚴重，收縮情況較整體經濟更差，而金融業則溫和增長。
mt_raw: Affected by the COVID-19 pandemic, Hong Kong's economy contracted by 6.1% in 2020, marking the second consecutive year of contraction and the most severe annual decline since records began (Table 1). The sharp decline in economic activity was primarily due to a significant contraction in domestic demand (Figure 1). The outbreak of the virus and corresponding social distancing measures severely damaged local consumption activities. Due to deteriorating business environments, overall investment spending also decreased markedly. Externally, despite disruptions to supply chains and global demand contractions caused by the pandemic, some sectors benefited from China's rapid recovery of production and economic activities, resulting in only slight declines in Hong Kong's total goods exports for the year. In contrast, due to lockdowns, border closures, and restrictions on passenger flows, the global tourism industry came to a standstill, leading to serious setbacks for Hong Kong's service exports. Weakness in local and transshipment-driven demand also led to deterioration in goods imports and service inputs. Since the decline in import volume occurred faster than the decline in exports, net exports (trade surplus) provided support for gross domestic product (GDP) (Figure 1). Analyzing by economic sector, industries closely related to consumption and tourism, such as retail, accommodation, and food services, were hit particularly hard, with more severe contractions than the overall economy. In contrast, the financial sector experienced moderate growth.

terms: {'流動性': 'Liquidity', '紓困措施': 'relief measures', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector', '防疫抗疫基金': 'Anti-Epidemic Fund', '預算': 'budget requests'}
src_raw: 政府為應對疫情，透過2020至21年度《財政預算案》迅速推出歷來最大規模的紓困措施，並從「防疫抗疫基金」發放4輪補助，合共超過3,000億港元。這些措施包括向合資格居民發放一筆過10,000港元現金、透過「保就業」計劃提供工資補貼，以及為受疫情重創的行業提供一筆過資助、寬減租金及豁免收費。金管局則採取三管齊下的方式支持銀行業，從而支撐實體經濟。有關措施包括與銀行業積極協調，減輕企業及家庭的資金周轉壓力，釋放緩衝以提高銀行的借貸能力，並確保銀行有足夠流動性支持本地經濟活動。
mt_raw: In response to the pandemic, the government swiftly introduced the largest-scale relief measures in history through the 2020-21 Fiscal Budget, disbursing four rounds of subsidies from the "Epidemic Control and Prevention Fund," totaling over HK$300 billion. These measures included one-time cash payments of HK$10,000 to eligible residents, wage subsidies through the "Employment Support Scheme," and lump-sum grants, rent reductions, and fee waivers for sectors heavily affected by the pandemic. The HKMA adopted a three-pronged approach to support the banking sector, thereby sustaining the real economy. The measures included actively coordinating with the banking industry to alleviate liquidity pressures on businesses and households, releasing buffers to enhance banks' lending capacity, and ensuring banks had sufficient liquidity to support local economic activities.

terms: {'全球經濟': 'world economy', '名義工資': 'Nominal wage', '基本通脹率': 'underlying inflation rate', '消費物價指數': 'consumer price inflation', '紓困措施': 'relief measures', '通脹': 'inflation'}
src_raw: 通脹壓力在2020年明顯減弱。剔除政府一次性紓困措施的影響，基本通脹率放緩至1.3%，是2009年全球金融危機以來最小的升幅。基本食品（尤其新鮮豬肉）的價格壓力明顯減退；而自行烹煮以外，由於飲食業提供大幅度折扣，所以外出用膳的價格在下半年亦有所下降。隨着早前新簽訂的私人住宅租金回落，消費物價指數租金項目的增長亦回軟（圖2）。更廣泛而言，由於名義工資增長減慢及商業樓宇租金偏軟，本地營商成本壓力減少；而在疲弱的全球經濟狀況下，進口價格通脹有所緩和。
mt_raw: Inflation pressures weakened significantly in 2020. Excluding the impact of the one-off government relief measures, the core inflation rate slowed to 1.3%, the smallest increase since the global financial crisis of 2009. Price pressures for basic foods, particularly fresh pork, significantly eased; meanwhile, prices for dining out declined in the second half of the year due to substantial discounts offered by the catering industry outside home cooking. With the recent signing of private residential rental agreements declining, the growth in the consumer price index (CPI) housing component also softened (Figure 2). More broadly, as nominal wage growth slowed and commercial property rents remained weak, local business cost pressures decreased. Additionally, import price inflation eased under the weak global economic conditions.

terms: {'勞工市場': 'labour market', '名義工資': 'Nominal wage', '沙士': 'SARS', '私營機構': 'private-sector', '經季節性調整': 'seasonally adjusted'}
src_raw: 勞工市場在2020年急速惡化。經季節性調整的失業率年內由3.3%飆升至6.6%，為16年的高位（圖3），其中零售、住宿及膳食服務等受疫情重創行業的失業率達到10%以上。就業不足率亦於8月升至3.8%，為沙士疫情後的高位。部分由於經濟狀況急速惡化造成的周期性反應，勞動人口參與率輕微減少。總就業人數（圖3）及私營機構職位空缺急跌，反映整體勞工需求進一步收縮。名義工資及收入增長進一步放緩。政府推出「保就業」計劃，為僱主提供有時限的財政支援以保留僱員，使勞工市場獲得一定程度的支持。
mt_raw: The labor market rapidly deteriorated in 2020. The seasonally adjusted unemployment rate surged from 3.3% to 6.6% during the year, reaching a 16-year high (Figure 3), with unemployment rates exceeding 10% in sectors heavily hit by the pandemic, such as retail, accommodation, and food services. The underemployment rate also rose to 3.8% in August, the highest level since the SARS epidemic. Partly due to cyclical reactions arising from the rapid worsening of the economic situation, the labor force participation rate slightly decreased. Total employment (Figure 3) and private sector job vacancies sharply dropped, reflecting further contraction in overall labor demand. Nominal wage and income growth further slowed. The government launched the "Employment Support Scheme," providing temporary financial support to employers to retain employees, offering some support to the labor market.

terms: {'中央銀行': 'central banking', '恒生指數': 'Hang Seng Index', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '首次公開招股': 'initial public offerings'}
src_raw: 隨着新冠病毒疫情爆發，恒生指數在首季急跌至3年低位。繼各國中央銀行及政府推出大型支持措施後，股市在第2季及第3季略為回穩（圖4）。由於新冠病毒疫苗研發出現突破，股市於接近年底時重拾一些上升動力。恒生指數於年底收報27,231點，全年計錄得3.4%跌幅。受惠於內地企業在香港的第二上市活動，2020年本港首次公開招股集資總額約4,000億港元，以集資額計全球排名第二。
mt_raw: With the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic, the Hang Seng Index fell sharply to a three-year low in the first quarter. After central banks and governments worldwide introduced large-scale supportive measures, stock markets stabilized slightly in the second and third quarters (Figure 4). As breakthroughs in the development of the COVID-19 vaccine emerged, the stock market regained some upward momentum near year-end. The Hang Seng Index closed at 27,231 points at year-end, recording a 3.4% decline for the year. Benefiting from the secondary listings of mainland companies in Hong Kong, the total fundraising amount of initial public offerings (IPOs) in Hong Kong reached approximately HK$400 billion in 2020, ranking second globally in terms of fundraising volume.

src_raw: 部分受到超低利率所支持，住宅物業市場在2020年大致平穩（圖4）。整體樓價及成交量較前一年均無大變動。然而，由於家庭住戶入息減少，置業負擔能力更為偏緊。另一方面，非住宅物業市場進一步轉弱，物業價格錄得不同程度跌幅，成交量亦見底。受經濟下滑及空置率上升的影響，寫字樓及零售物業租金大幅下跌。鑑於2019年以來非住宅物業市場已出現大幅調整，並預期會持續受壓，加上考慮到經濟基調及外圍環境等其他因素，金管局於8月調整非住宅物業的逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施。政府因應市場需求回落，亦於11月撤銷購置非住宅物業的雙倍從價印花稅這項需求管理措施。
mt_raw: Supported by ultra-low interest rates, the residential property market remained relatively stable in 2020 (Figure 4). Overall property prices and trading volumes showed little change compared to the previous year. However, due to reduced household incomes, housing affordability became tighter. On the other hand, the non-residential property market further weakened, with property prices recording varying degrees of declines and trading volumes hitting bottom. Due to the economic downturn and rising vacancy rates, office and retail property rents plummeted dramatically. Given that the non-residential property market has already undergone significant adjustments since 2019 and is expected to continue facing pressure, along with considering other factors such as the economic fundamentals and external environment, the HKMA adjusted the counter-cyclical macroprudential regulations for non-residential properties in August. In response to the decline in market demand, the government also abolished the double ad valorem stamp duty on purchasing non-residential properties in November.

terms: {'實質本地生產總值': 'real GDP', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '私營機構': 'private-sector'}
src_raw: 新冠病毒疫苗接種可望使經濟活動回復正常，預期香港經濟在2021年（全年合計）重拾正增長，然而經濟復甦的力度及步伐仍受疫情發展及疫苗供應、覆蓋範圍和成效等眾多不明朗因素影響。具體而言，疫苗廣泛接種需時，因此本地經濟在2021年早段仍面對相當程度的挑戰。對外方面，預計內地經濟會進一步增強，並為香港貨物及服務輸出帶來支持，然而其他主要經濟體的復甦步伐將取決於其大規模接種疫苗計劃的成效。政府預測2021年實質本地生產總值增長率介乎3.5至5.5%之間，與國際組織及私營機構分析員對香港最新的增長預測平均4.4%相符。
mt_raw: The vaccination against the COVID-19 is expected to enable economic activities to return to normal, with expectations that Hong Kong's economy will resume positive growth in 2021 (for the full year). However, the strength and pace of the economic recovery remain influenced by numerous uncertainties related to the development of the pandemic and the supply, coverage, and effectiveness of vaccines. Specifically, widespread vaccination will take time, so the local economy will still face considerable challenges in the early part of 2021. Externally, it is expected that the mainland economy will further strengthen, providing support for Hong Kong's goods and service exports. However, the recovery pace of other major economies will depend on the effectiveness of their large-scale vaccination programs. The government forecasts that the real GDP growth rate for 2021 will range between 3.5% and 5.5%, aligning with the average of 4.4% predicted by international organizations and private sector analysts for Hong Kong's latest growth projections.

src_raw: 鑑於環球及本地經濟狀況仍具挑戰，預期2021年的通脹壓力將維持輕微。此外，早前新簽訂私人住宅租金回落的傳遞效應，將繼續令本地通脹受到抑制。市場共識預測2021年整體通脹率為1.5%，而政府預期整體及基本通脹率分別為1.6%及1%。由於經濟前景在2021年早段仍具挑戰，加上私營機構分析員預計2021年全年失業率仍會在約5.9%的偏高水平，因此短期內勞工市場將繼續受壓。
mt_raw: Given the continued challenges posed by global and local economic conditions, inflationary pressures are expected to remain mild in 2021. Moreover, the transmission effect of the recent decline in new private residential rentals will continue to suppress local inflation. Consensus in the market predicts an overall inflation rate of 1.5% for 2021, while the government expects the overall and core inflation rates to be 1.6% and 1%, respectively. Due to the challenging outlook for the economy in the early part of 2021 and the prediction by private sector analysts that the annual unemployment rate will remain at around 5.9%—a relatively high level—the labor market will continue to face pressure in the short term.

src_raw: 儘管新冠病毒疫情增加不確定因素，港元外匯及貨幣市場運作暢順有序。受到大量股票相關的資金流入所支持，港元匯率於2020 年內大部分時間偏強，而強方兌換保證多次被觸發。聯繫匯率制度是香港金融體系的基石，充分展現強大的抵禦衝擊的能力。
mt_raw: Despite the increased uncertainties caused by the COVID-19 pandemic, the Hong Kong foreign exchange and money markets operated smoothly and orderly. Supported by significant inflows of stock-related funds, the Hong Kong dollar remained strong throughout most of 2020, with the stronger-side exchange rate mechanism being triggered multiple times. The linked exchange rate system is the cornerstone of Hong Kong's financial system, demonstrating its strong resilience against shocks.

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: The primary objective of Hong Kong's monetary policy is to maintain currency stability, which means ensuring stable exchange rates of the Hong Kong dollar, keeping the exchange rate of the Hong Kong dollar against the US dollar within the range of HK$7.75 to HK$7.85 per US dollar. This monetary regime mainly adopts the currency board system, stipulating that the USD reserves held by the Exchange Fund must provide full support for the monetary base; any changes in the monetary base must be matched by corresponding increases or decreases in USD reserves, fully aligning with the changes in the monetary base.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。當強方（或弱方）兌換保證被觸發，金管局會應銀行要求，按每美元兌7.75港元向銀行沽出港元、買入美元（或按7.85港元買入港元、沽出美元），使總結餘增加（或減少），令港元利率下跌（或上升），從而促使港元匯率回復到7.75至7.85 的兌換範圍。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority maintains the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and a firm commitment to fulfill the exchange guarantee. When the stronger-side (or weaker-side) exchange guarantee is triggered, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority will sell HKD and buy USD (or buy HKD and sell USD) at HK$7.75 (or HK$7.85) per USD upon request from banks, increasing (or decreasing) the total reserve balances, thereby reducing (or increasing) the Hong Kong dollar interest rates to restore the exchange rate to the HK$7.75-HK$7.85 range.

src_raw: 隨着3月全球爆發新冠病毒疫情，避險情緒下環球投資者增持美元，令美元資金狀況明顯收緊。在聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）下，由於港元利率受同期美元利率影響，美元流動性緊張令香港貨幣狀況收緊。儘管其後美國聯邦儲備局實施流動資金計劃，美元資金壓力有所紓緩，但由於股票相關需求及季結效應，令香港貨幣狀況仍維持偏緊。而港元需求殷切，加上港元與美元的正息差刺激套息交易活動，促使港元匯率偏向強方兌換保證匯率（圖1），強方兌換保證最終於4月被觸發。其後新股集資活動暢旺，以及「滬港通」與「深港通」下的南向資金帶動股票相關資金流入，令港元一直維持接近7.75水平，並導致強方兌換保證在2020年內多次被觸發。強方兌換保證在4月21日至10月28日期間合共被觸發85次，累計資金流入3,835億港元。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2020年全年運作正常。
mt_raw: With the global outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic in March, the flight-to-safety sentiment led global investors to increase their holdings of USD, resulting in tightened USD liquidity conditions. Under the linked exchange rate system (linked exchange rate system), since Hong Kong dollar interest rates were influenced by concurrent USD interest rates, tight USD liquidity conditions tightened Hong Kong's money market conditions. Although the US Federal Reserve implemented liquidity programs later, the pressure on USD funding eased somewhat, but due to stock-related demand and seasonal effects, Hong Kong's money market conditions remained tight. Strong demand for the Hong Kong dollar, combined with positive interest rate differentials between the Hong Kong dollar and USD stimulating carry trade activities, resulted in the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate remaining close to the stronger-side exchange rate (Figure 1). The stronger-side exchange rate was ultimately triggered in April. Subsequently, vigorous new share fundraising activities, along with Southbound capital flows under the Shanghai-Hong Kong Stock Connect and Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect, drove stock-related fund inflows, keeping the Hong Kong dollar near the HK$7.75 level and leading to the stronger-side exchange rate being triggered multiple times during 2020. The stronger-side exchange rate was triggered 85 times between April 21 and October 28, involving cumulative fund inflows of HK$383.5 billion. Overall, the Hong Kong foreign exchange market operated normally throughout 2020.

src_raw: 總結餘（進行貼現窗活動前）與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2019年底的11,330億港元，增加至2020年底的15,266億港元（圖2）。隨着強方兌換保證被觸發，金管局應銀行要求合共沽出3,835億港元。新冠病毒疫情引致環球宏觀環境波動，金管局為了提供額外港元流動性，亦於4月底及5月初逐步減發總計200億港元外匯基金票據。由於強方兌換保證被觸發及外匯基金票據發行量減少，總結餘（進行貼現窗活動前）由2019年底的543億港元，增加至2020年底的4,575億港元。年內未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由10,787億港元，稍降至10,692億港元，反映外匯基金票據發行量減少，這抵銷了按一貫做法以新發行的外匯基金票據及債券來吸納未償還外匯基金票據及債券的利息。整體貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: Total reserve balances (before discount window operations) and the total amount of outstanding Foreign Exchange Fund bills and bonds increased from HK$1.133 trillion at the end of 2019 to HK$1.5266 trillion at the end of 2020 (Figure 2). With the trigger of the stronger-side exchange rate, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority sold a total of HK$383.5 billion to banks. Due to the volatile global macroeconomic environment caused by the COVID-19 pandemic, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority gradually reduced the issuance of HK$20 billion worth of Foreign Exchange Fund bills in late April and early May to provide additional Hong Kong dollar liquidity. As the stronger-side exchange rate was triggered and the issuance volume of Foreign Exchange Fund bills decreased, total reserve balances (before discount window operations) increased from HK$54.3 billion at the end of 2019 to HK$457.5 billion at the end of 2020. Throughout the year, the total amount of outstanding Foreign Exchange Fund bills and bonds slightly decreased from HK$1.0787 trillion to HK$1.0692 trillion, reflecting the reduction in Foreign Exchange Fund bill issuances, which offset the interest payments on outstanding Foreign Exchange Fund bills and bonds through the usual practice of issuing new Foreign Exchange Fund bills and bonds. The monetary base remained fully supported by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 隨着農曆新年假期後流動性需求減退，香港銀行同業拆息在2月普遍下降（圖3）。踏入3月，由於美元資金壓力，連同新股集資相關及季結資金需求等本地因素，香港銀行同業拆息一度上升。其後由於強方兌換保證被觸發及外匯基金票據發行量減少，令總結餘增加，港元流動性狀況逐步紓緩。
mt_raw: Following the Lunar New Year holiday, liquidity demand decreased, causing the Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rate (HIBOR) to generally decline in February (Figure 3). Entering March, due to tight USD funding conditions, together with local factors such as new share fundraising-related and seasonal liquidity demands, HIBOR rose temporarily. Subsequently, with the trigger of the stronger-side exchange rate and the reduction in Foreign Exchange Fund bill issuances, total reserve balances increased, gradually easing the Hong Kong dollar liquidity situation.

src_raw: 因應美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍於3月兩度下調，以及反映年內隔夜與1個月香港銀行同業拆息變動，基本利率由年初的2.73厘下降至年底收報0.50厘。在零售層面，儘管美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍調低，銀行仍維持最優惠貸款利率不變。整體而言，香港貨幣市場繼續正常運作。貼現窗借貸由2019年的383億港元降至2020年的91億港元。
mt_raw: In response to two cuts in the US federal funds rate target range in March, as well as reflecting the annual movements of overnight and one-month HIBORs, the benchmark interest rate declined from 2.73% at the beginning of the year to 0.50% by year-end. In the retail sector, despite the reduction in the US federal funds rate target range, banks maintained their prime lending rates unchanged. Overall, the Hong Kong money market continued to operate normally. Discount window lending decreased from HK$38.3 billion in 2019 to HK$9.1 billion in 2020.

src_raw: 過去30多年來，聯匯制度一直是香港金融體系的重要支柱，歷經考驗均能展現強大的抵禦衝擊的能力。儘管2020年面對挑戰，港元外匯及貨幣市場保持正常運作，一再證明聯匯制度穩健有效。年內面對一些毫無根據的謠言，質疑聯匯制度以至香港的金融穩定，金管局迅速向公眾重申香港會繼續實施聯匯制度，同時資金自由流動及港幣自由兌換受到《基本法》第112條保障。金管局另又發表多篇文章，闡明逆境下香港金融體系繼續展現強大抵禦衝擊能力的事實。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。香港的金融市場有序運作，以及港元繼續如常作為支付及保值貨幣，反映上述措施有效維持公眾對聯匯制度的信心。國際貨幣基金組織在《2020年對外部門報告》重申香港擁有具透明度的規則、充裕的財政及外匯儲備、穩健的金融規管與監管、靈活的經濟，以及審慎的財政架構，確保聯匯制度具公信力。
mt_raw: Over the past 30 years, the linked exchange rate system has been a key pillar of Hong Kong's financial system, consistently demonstrating strong resilience against shocks. Despite the challenges faced in 2020, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange and money markets maintained normal operations, repeatedly proving the soundness and effectiveness of the linked exchange rate system. During the year, amid some groundless rumors questioning the linked exchange rate system and Hong Kong's financial stability, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority promptly reaffirmed to the public that Hong Kong would continue to implement the linked exchange rate system, while free flow of capital and free convertibility of the Hong Kong dollar are guaranteed by Article 112 of the Basic Law. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority also published several articles explaining the facts that Hong Kong's financial system continues to demonstrate strong resilience against shocks even under adversity. The Government firmly upheld the linked exchange rate system. The orderly operation of Hong Kong's financial market and the continued normal functioning of the Hong Kong dollar as a medium of payment and store of value reflected the effectiveness of these measures in maintaining public confidence in the linked exchange rate system. The International Monetary Fund reiterated in its 2020 External Sector Report that Hong Kong possesses transparent rules, ample fiscal and foreign exchange reserves, a robust financial regulatory framework, a flexible economy, and prudent fiscal arrangements, ensuring the credibility of the linked exchange rate system.

src_raw: 穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用。儘管新冠病毒疫情構成負面影響，香港銀行體系繼續運作暢順，流動性及資本水平以國際標準而言均非常充裕。為確保銀行體系具備承受衝擊的能力，金管局一直密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行貸款的監管。與此同時，金管局亦為銀行體系提供更多流動性，維持貨幣及金融穩定。除減發外匯基金票據以增加港元流動性外，金管局為銀行設立一系列流動資金安排。此外，金管局與銀行保持聯繫，確保它們在緊張情況時利用這些流動資金安排。因應新冠病毒疫情為環球金融市場帶來波動及不確定因素，金管局推出臨時性美元流動資金安排，為持牌銀行提供美元流動性支援，有助紓緩環球美元銀行拆借市場流動性緊絀的情況。
mt_raw: A sound banking system plays a crucial role in the normal operation of the linked exchange rate system. Despite the negative impact of the COVID-19 pandemic, Hong Kong's banking system continued to function smoothly, with liquidity and capital levels being very abundant by international standards. To ensure the banking system's capacity to withstand shocks, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority has continuously monitored banks' credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as stress test results, and maintained oversight of bank loans. At the same time, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority provided more liquidity to the banking system to maintain monetary and financial stability. In addition to reducing the issuance of Foreign Exchange Fund bills to increase Hong Kong dollar liquidity, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority established a series of liquidity facilities for banks. Furthermore, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority maintained communication with banks to ensure they could utilize these liquidity facilities during tense situations. In response to the volatility and uncertainty brought about by the COVID-19 pandemic to global financial markets, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority introduced temporary U.S. dollar liquidity facilities to provide U.S. dollar liquidity support to licensed banks, helping alleviate the tightening of liquidity in the global U.S. dollar interbank market.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2020年在109.8至112.1%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日收報109.9%（圖4）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，加上香港穩健的銀行體系，為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強而有力的後盾。
mt_raw: To enhance transparency of the currency board accounts, since October 1998, part of the assets of the Exchange Fund have been designated to support the monetary base. The support ratio (the ratio of supporting assets to the monetary base) fluctuated between 109.8% and 112.1% in 2020, without touching the upper or lower limits. The ratio closed at 109.9% as of December 31 (Figure 4). Under the linked exchange rate system, although certain assets of the Exchange Fund have been designated as part of the support portfolio, all assets of the Exchange Fund can be used to support the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate. The substantial financial resources of the Exchange Fund, coupled with Hong Kong's sound banking system, provide a strong and powerful foundation for safeguarding Hong Kong's monetary and financial stability.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會負責監察及探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2020年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括香港經濟的情景分析、香港物業市場的評估、了解跨境資金流的概念架構，以及了解香港銀行同業市場。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Currency Issuance Committee under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee is responsible for monitoring and discussing issues related to Hong Kong's currency and financial stability. In 2020, topics discussed by the Currency Issuance Committee included scenario analysis of Hong Kong's economy, evaluation of the property market, conceptual framework for understanding cross-border fund flows, and understanding of the Hong Kong interbank market. Meeting records of the Currency Issuance Committee and the currency board system operating reports submitted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority are available on the Hong Kong Monetary Authority website.

src_raw: 疫情持續下，香港貨幣及金融研究中心（研究中心）在2020年仍能維持一定數量的研究成果。在2020年，研究中心合共發表20篇研究論文，涵蓋貨幣政策、銀行體系穩定、市場微觀結構和金融科技發展等廣泛議題，部份論文已獲接納或正被評審在專業期刊中刊登。在疫情下由於要實施社交距離及旅遊限制，研究中心舉辦的研討會、講座及到訪研究計劃等主要活動需要押後，待日後公共衛生和旅遊條件回復正常後，研究中心將會復辦上述活動。
mt_raw: Under the ongoing pandemic, the Hong Kong Currency and Financial Research Centre (Research Centre) maintained a certain number of research outputs in 2020. In 2020, the Research Centre published a total of 20 research papers covering a wide range of topics including monetary policy, banking system stability, market microstructure, and development of fintech. Some of these papers have been accepted or are undergoing review for publication in professional journals. Due to social distancing and travel restrictions during the pandemic, major events organized by the Research Centre such as seminars, lectures, and visiting research programs needed to be postponed until public health and travel conditions return to normal, after which the Research Centre will resume these activities.

src_raw: 硬幣收集計劃於2014年10月推出，年內繼續廣受大眾歡迎。這是全球首個有系統的流動硬幣收集計劃，設有兩部收銀車輪流停駐全港18區。每部收銀車均裝設兩部高速硬幣點算機，市民可選擇將硬幣轉換成鈔票或用作八達通卡或電子錢包等儲值支付工具增值，亦可將款項放入車內的公益金捐款箱。此外，金管局與香港社會服務聯會合作，在非政府組織賣旗日派出收銀車收集硬幣。收銀車亦到訪學校，增進學生對硬幣收集計劃的認識。過去多年硬幣收集計劃曾獲頒多個本港及國際獎項，對其創新及環保的處理方法予以肯定。
mt_raw: The Coin Collection Scheme was launched in October 2014 and remained popular with the general public throughout the year. It is the world's first systematic mobile coin collection initiative, featuring two cash collection vehicles stationed alternately across all 18 districts of Hong Kong. Each cash collection vehicle is equipped with two high-speed coin counting machines, allowing citizens to either exchange coins for banknotes or use them to top up Octopus cards or electronic wallets, or deposit the money into donation boxes inside the vehicles. Additionally, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority collaborated with the Hong Kong Social Service League to deploy the cash collection vehicles during non-governmental organization flag-raising days to collect coins. The vehicles also visited schools to raise student awareness of the Coin Collection Scheme. Over the years, the Coin Collection Scheme has received numerous local and international awards recognizing its innovative and environmentally friendly handling methods.

src_raw: 儘管新冠病毒疫情爆發為經濟帶來重大挑戰，香港銀行體系於2020年維持穩健。年內金管局除密切留意疫情對銀行營運及監管活動的影響並靈活應變外，繼續將監管重點放在認可機構的信用及流動性風險管理上。鑑於網絡威脅持續增加及銀行業使用金融科技的上升趨勢，金管局加強對認可機構科技風險管理及運作穩健性的監管。金管局亦與銀行及國際組織緊密合作，促進業界過渡至備用參考利率。
mt_raw: Despite the significant challenges posed by the outbreak of the novel coronavirus, the Hong Kong banking system remained sound in 2020. Throughout the year, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) closely monitored the impact of the pandemic on banks' operations and regulatory activities, adapting flexibly while continuing to focus on the credit and liquidity risk management of Authorised Institutions (AIs). Given the increasing cybersecurity threats and the rising trend of fintech adoption in the banking sector, the HKMA strengthened its oversight of AIs' technology risk management and operational resilience. The HKMA also cooperated closely with banks and international organizations to facilitate the industry's transition to alternative reference rates.

src_raw: 在操守監管方面，金管局給予認可機構在遵守監管規定上彈性處理的空間以及提供指引，以便一方面協助銀行在疫情下的業務運作及繼續為客戶提供服務，另一方面則繼續確保投資者及消費者得到保障。金管局聯同有關當局制定「跨境理財通」業務試點的建議實施細則，並諮詢業界。金管局與證券及期貨事務監察委員會合作，就精簡有關家族辦公室及擁有高資產淨值並精於財務事宜的投資者的銷售程序提供指引。此外，金管局加強對數碼金融服務消費者的保障，並繼續推動以客為本的企業文化。
mt_raw: In terms of conduct supervision, the HKMA provided flexibility to AIs in complying with regulatory requirements while offering guidance to help banks maintain business operations during the pandemic and continue serving customers, while ensuring investor and consumer protection. The HKMA, in collaboration with relevant authorities, developed proposed implementation details for the pilot scheme of Cross-border Wealth Management Connect and sought industry feedback. Working with the Securities and Futures Commission, the HKMA provided guidance to streamline sales procedures for family offices and investors with high net worth who are financially sophisticated. Furthermore, the HKMA enhanced protections for consumers of digital financial services and continued promoting a customer-centric corporate culture.

src_raw: 在打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集方面，金管局迅速採取行動，不但釐清風險為本方法及科技如何協助認可機構更有效應對與新冠病毒疫情相關的情況，並同時審慎應對持續升溫的地緣政治緊張局勢對銀行體系造成的影響。金管局繼續支持有關提升打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集工作的成效與效率的措施，包括增加參與公私營夥伴共享訊息的認可機構數目，以及支持銀行業採用合規科技。金管局又順應科技及數據運用的國際發展趨勢，展開進一步加強打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集監察能力的計劃。
mt_raw: Regarding anti-money laundering and counter-terrorism financing, the HKMA swiftly took action to clarify how a risk-based approach and technological advancements can assist AIs in effectively addressing situations related to the novel coronavirus, while carefully managing the impacts of escalating geopolitical tensions on the banking system. The HKMA continued supporting initiatives aimed at enhancing the effectiveness and efficiency of anti-money laundering and counter-terrorism financing efforts, including increasing the number of AIs participating in public-private information-sharing partnerships and supporting the banking industry's adoption of compliance technologies. The HKMA also aligned with global trends in technological and data utilization, initiating further plans to strengthen monitoring capabilities against money laundering and terrorist financing.

src_raw: 與此同時，金管局與銀行業緊密合作，優化監管政策與程序，以及推行提升人才專業能力的措施。香港在實施國際監管標準方面取得理想進展，包括資本充足標準和披露標準。在促進綠色及可持續銀行業的發展方面，金管局已進入三個階段中的第二階段，正制定相關監管規定。金管局亦繼續致力確保香港備有具公信力的認可機構處置機制，包括制定新處置標準及實施吸收虧損能力規定的規則，以提升認可機構的處置可行性。
mt_raw: At the same time, the HKMA worked closely with the banking industry to optimize regulatory policies and procedures, as well as implement measures to enhance talent professionalism. Hong Kong achieved satisfactory progress in implementing international regulatory standards, including capital adequacy and disclosure standards. Regarding the development of green and sustainable banking, the HKMA entered the second phase of three stages and was formulating relevant regulatory provisions. The HKMA also continued to ensure that Hong Kong maintains a credible resolution mechanism for Authorised Institutions, including developing new resolution standards and implementing rules for absorbency requirements to improve the feasibility of resolving Authorised Institutions.

src_raw: 金管局的整體目標之一是促進銀行體系的安全及穩定。要達致這個目標，實有賴建立及維持具高度應對能力且能為香港經濟提供所需關鍵金融服務的金融體系。
mt_raw: One of the HKMA's overall objectives is to promote the safety and stability of the banking system. Achieving this goal relies on establishing and maintaining a highly resilient financial system capable of providing essential financial services required by Hong Kong's economy.

src_raw: 銀行可能因營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊、應對危機及自危機中恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。金融管理專員亦負責某些金融市場基建的指定及監管。
mt_raw: Banks may affect the stability of the banking system due to their operational methods, or in extreme cases, due to disorderly failures. As a regulator, the Chief Executive of the HKMA plays a vital role in safeguarding financial stability, ensuring banks are capable of withstanding shocks, responding to crises, and resuming normal operations to ultimately prevent failures. The Chief Executive is responsible for prudent supervision of banks and authorizing licensed banks, restricted license banks, and deposit-taking companies (collectively referred to as "Authorised Institutions"). The Chief Executive is also responsible for the designation and regulation of certain financial market infrastructures.

src_raw: 然而，金融管理專員不能確保金融體系全無風險，香港的審慎監管制度亦並非為確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，能有秩序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員在該機制下為認可機構（以及其他類型機構）的處置機制當局。為落實香港的處置機制，必須制定處置規則及政策標準、進行處置規劃以排除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置瀕臨倒閉認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: However, the Chief Executive cannot guarantee that the financial system has no risks, and the prudent regulatory framework in Hong Kong is not designed to ensure "zero risk." As one of the resolution mechanism authorities, the Chief Executive aims to ensure that if an Authorised Institution becomes unsustainable, its failure can be handled orderly. To this end, a financial institution resolution mechanism has been established in Hong Kong, with the Chief Executive acting as the resolution authority for Authorised Institutions (and other types of institutions). To implement Hong Kong's resolution mechanism, it is necessary to formulate resolution rules and policy standards, conduct resolution planning to remove obstacles to the feasibility of resolving Authorised Institutions, and establish operational capabilities within the HKMA to resolve failing Authorised Institutions. To effectively execute these tasks, the HKMA adopts internationally coordinated approaches.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局亦進行定期現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估屬較高風險的範疇。金管局於年內共進行610次現場審查及專題評估，並繼續以信用風險管理作為審查及評估的主要重點之一。另一個重點是在新冠病毒疫情下的業務操作風險及科技風險管理。此外，金管局又增加針對流動性及市場風險管理的現場審查及專題評估次數。同時，專項審查小組亦對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查及專題評估。
mt_raw: In addition to off-site inspections, the HKMA carried out regular on-site inspections, complemented by thematic assessments to examine higher-risk areas. The HKMA conducted 610 on-site inspections and thematic assessments during the year and continued to prioritize credit risk management as one of the main focuses of inspection and assessment. Another priority was operational risks and technology risk management under the pandemic. Additionally, the HKMA increased the frequency of on-site inspections and thematic assessments regarding liquidity and market risk management. At the same time, special inspection teams conducted on-site inspections and thematic assessments on various aspects such as securities, investment products, insurance, and Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF)-related businesses of Authorised Institutions.

src_raw: 受到新冠病毒疫情影響，認可機構的資產質素略為轉差。年內銀行業的特定分類貸款比率由0.57%上升至0.90%，仍維持在穩健水平，遠低於2000年以來的長期平均水平1.8%。內地相關貸款方面，相關比率亦由一年前的0.75%上升至0.96%。
mt_raw: Since the introduction of several rounds of countercyclical macroprudential measures starting in 2009, the HKMA has significantly strengthened banks' risk management and the resilience of Hong Kong's banking system against sudden reversals in the property market. The average loan-to-value ratio for newly issued residential mortgage loans was 57% in December 2020, compared to 64% when the first round of countercyclical measures was introduced in September 2009. The average loan-to-value ratio for newly issued residential mortgage loans increased slightly in 2020, primarily due to a higher proportion of loans covered by mortgage insurance, which generally have higher loan-to-value ratios. The average debt-to-income ratio for newly issued mortgages remained low at 37% in December, compared to 41% when the ratio ceiling was first introduced in August 2010 (Figure 1).

src_raw: 因應新冠病毒疫情爆發，金管局於2019年10月成立的銀行業中小企貸款協調機制（協調機制）推出多輪協助企業及個人客戶的紓緩措施，鼓勵銀行在審慎風險管理原則容許下繼續支持借款人的融資需要。其中最主要的是協調機制於5月推出的「預先批核還息不還本」計劃。計劃下合資格的企業客戶的所有貸款本金還款可延期6個月。該計劃在11月延長6個月後，在2021年3月再度延長6個月至10月底。該計劃約有100間銀行參與，覆蓋12萬合資格企業客戶。截至12月底，銀行共批出58,000多宗企業客戶貸款展期及其他支援措施的個案，涉及金額超過7,400億港元。個人客戶方面，銀行亦推出住宅按揭「還息不還本」計劃，「居者有其屋計劃」下資助房屋的相關按揭亦涵蓋在內。此外，銀行亦提供應急貸款予從事受疫情嚴重打擊行業的客戶、延長個人貸款期限，以及下調各種個人信貸的收費。截至12月底，銀行共批出28,000多宗住宅按揭「還息不還本」及其他個人應急貸款的個案，涉及金額超過440億港元。
mt_raw: In response to the outbreak of the novel coronavirus, the Banking Sector SME Loan Coordination Mechanism (Coordination Mechanism), established by the HKMA in October 2019, launched multiple rounds of relief measures to support enterprises and individual customers, encouraging banks to continue supporting borrowers' funding needs under prudent risk management principles. The most notable measure was the "Pre-approved Interest-only Repayment Plan" launched by the Coordination Mechanism in May. Under this plan, eligible enterprise customers could defer repayment of principal on all their loans for six months. After being extended for another six months in November, the plan was further extended until the end of October 2021. Approximately 100 banks participated in this plan, covering 120,000 eligible enterprise customers. By the end of December, banks approved over 58,000 cases of business client loan deferrals and other support measures, involving amounts exceeding HK$740 billion. For individual customers, banks also launched the "Interest-only Repayment" scheme for residential mortgages, including mortgage loans under the Home Ownership Scheme. Additionally, banks provided emergency loans to customers in sectors severely affected by the pandemic, extended personal loan terms, and reduced charges on various forms of personal credit. By the end of December, banks approved over 28,000 cases of "Interest-only Repayment" for residential mortgages and other personal emergency loans, involving amounts exceeding HK$44 billion.

mt_raw: Considering the price trends and transaction volumes of non-residential properties, the economic fundamentals, and external conditions, the HKMA eased the countercyclical macroprudential measures for non-residential property mortgage loans in August, raising the applicable loan-to-value ratio ceiling by 10 percentage points. terms: {'新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector'}
src_raw: 因應2020年初爆發新冠病毒疫情，金管局採取連串措施減低疫情對銀行業務運作的影響。有關措施包括要求認可機構檢討其持續業務運作計劃，並採取適當的預防措施，以保障員工與客戶的健康，以及維持重要銀行服務。此外，金管局提醒認可機構加強與員工及客戶的溝通，就其處所可能出現確診個案的情況作好準備，以及制定應對較為嚴峻但可能發生的風險情境的持續業務運作計劃。金管局與業界保持緊密聯繫，又要求認可機構保持警覺，並因應疫情的最新發展及政府的社交距離措施，不時審視其持續業務運作計劃。
mt_raw: In response to the outbreak of the novel coronavirus in early 2020, the HKMA implemented a series of measures to mitigate the impact on bank operations. These measures included requiring Authorised Institutions to review their continuity of business operation plans and take appropriate preventive measures to protect the health of staff and customers, and ensure the smooth provision of essential banking services. Additionally, the HKMA reminded Authorised Institutions to enhance communication with staff and customers, prepare for potential confirmed cases at their premises, and develop continuity of business operation plans to address more severe but plausible risk scenarios. The HKMA maintained close contact with the industry and requested Authorised Institutions to remain vigilant, regularly reviewing their continuity of business operation plans in light of the latest developments of the pandemic and social distancing measures imposed by the government.

src_raw: 金管局完成對「網絡防衛計劃」的全面檢討及廣泛的業界諮詢後，於11月推出「網絡防衛計劃2.0」，因應海外網絡風險管理的最新做法，進一步提升「網絡防衛計劃」。當中「網絡防衛評估框架」加入了有關網絡事故應對及恢復的最新國際穩健做法。「網絡防衛計劃」下的「專業培訓計劃」方面，資歷認證清單的範圍有所擴大，納入主要海外地區的同等資歷。金管局又向香港銀行公會（銀行公會）提出多項建議，令「網絡風險資訊共享平台」更易於使用。「網絡防衛計劃2.0」於2021年1月1日生效。
mt_raw: Following a comprehensive review and extensive industry consultation on the "Cybersecurity Programme," the HKMA launched the "Cybersecurity Programme 2.0" in November, incorporating the latest international best practices in overseas cybersecurity risk management to further enhance the programme. The "Cybersecurity Assessment Framework" within the "Cybersecurity Programme" added the latest international robust practices regarding network incident response and recovery. The scope of the "Professional Training Programme" under the "Cybersecurity Programme" was expanded to include qualifications recognized in major overseas regions. The HKMA also proposed several recommendations to the Hong Kong Bankers Association (HKB) to make the "Network Risk Information Sharing Platform" more user-friendly. "Cybersecurity Programme 2.0" became effective on January 1, 2021.

src_raw: 經過在「金融科技監管沙盒」進行嚴謹的測試與試行後，所有在2019年獲發銀行牌照的8間虛擬銀行都已經於年內開業。虛擬銀行運用創新科技，提供全新的客戶體驗，例如利用大數據分析進行中小企貸款的信貸評估，以加快貸款批核程序。為加強客戶參與及建立客戶對品牌的忠誠，部分虛擬銀行更在其定期存款及獎賞計劃等服務中加入遊戲元素。
mt_raw: After undergoing rigorous testing and trial runs in the "Fintech Regulatory Sandbox," all eight virtual banks licensed in 2019 had commenced operations by the end of the year. Virtual banks utilize innovative technology to provide a new customer experience, such as using big data analytics for credit assessments of small and medium-sized enterprise loans to expedite loan approval processes. To enhance customer engagement and build brand loyalty, some virtual banks incorporated game elements into their savings accounts and reward programs.

mt_raw: In April, the HKMA introduced a series of measures to ensure the continued smooth functioning of the interbank market and the banking system during the pandemic. src_raw: 香港位處內地金融市場對外開放的要衝，能充分把握開放過程中的契機。憑藉世界級的市場基建以及「滬港通」、「深港通」與「債券通」，香港既是深受內地企業垂青的集資平台，亦是國際投資者進入增長迅速的內地市場的窗口。年內在促進粵港澳大灣區金融合作，尤其便利香港居民在大灣區內使用金融及銀行服務方面取得良好進展。
mt_raw: Located at the forefront of mainland China's financial market liberalization, Hong Kong can fully leverage opportunities during the opening process. With world-class market infrastructures and mechanisms such as the 'Shanghai-Hong Kong Stock Connect' and 'Bond Connect', Hong Kong serves both as a preferred financing platform for mainland enterprises and a gateway for international investors to access the rapidly growing mainland market. In the year, there were notable advancements in promoting financial cooperation within the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, particularly in facilitating financial and banking services for residents in the area.

mt_raw: At the same time, the HKMA actively explores new opportunities to enhance Hong Kong's financial platform capabilities, including asset and wealth management, corporate treasury centres, and sustainability finance. On the global stage, the HKMA holds leadership roles in several regional and international committees, demonstrating its professionalism and commitment in related international work.

src_raw:
為鞏固香港的亞洲金融科技樞紐地位，金管局繼續致力實施各項措施，促進銀行及支付行業開發與應用科技。年內的主要進展包括：
- 推動更廣泛使用快速支付系統「轉數快」；
- 促進銀行業實施開放應用程式介面（開放API）；
- 連接貿易融資平台「貿易聯動」與中國人民銀行（人民銀行）轄下的貿易金融區塊鏈平台，促進貿易融資數碼化；
- 研究央行數碼貨幣於跨境支付的應用；
- 探討「商業數據通」的技術可行性及研究新類型信貸評分模型，以助中小型企業（中小企）獲取融資；
- 公布旨在發展更具規模及更多元的合規科技生態圈的兩年計劃，進一步推動合規科技的應用；
- 加強培育人才；及
- 推進跨境金融科技合作。

src_raw: 隨着主要金融市場指數開始加入內地在岸證券或增加其權重，流入人民幣資產的資金繼續加快步伐。香港得天獨厚，憑藉連繫內地資本市場的「滬港通」、「深港通」及「債券通」，在促進國際投資者增加人民幣資產配置方面發揮關鍵的作用。在2020年，「債券通」平均每日交易額增加82%，至約193億元人民幣。為完善「債券通」運作，金管局推出新措施，包括新設特別結算周期服務、延長交易時間及引入新安排，讓投資者在選擇銀行進行貨幣兌換與外幣對沖方面有較多彈性。繼「債券通」北向通取得成功，金管局又與人民銀行組成工作小組研究南向通的框架。
mt_raw: As major financial market indices began incorporating mainland onshore securities or increasing their weights, capital flows into Renminbi (RMB) assets continued to accelerate. Hong Kong has unique advantages through the 'Shanghai-Hong Kong Stock Connect,' 'Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect,' and 'Bond Connect' mechanisms, playing a key role in enabling international investors to increase their RMB asset allocations. In 2020, the average daily trading volume of 'Bond Connect' increased by 82% to approximately RMB19.3 billion. To improve 'Bond Connect' operations, the HKMA introduced new measures, including special settlement cycle services, extended trading hours, and new arrangements allowing investors greater flexibility in choosing banks for currency conversion and foreign exchange hedging. Following the success of the northbound pilot under 'Bond Connect,' the HKMA formed a working group with the PBOC to study the framework for the southbound pilot.

src_raw: 金管局亦繼續致力加強香港與粵港澳大灣區（大灣區）內地城市之間的金融配套措施。內地當局公布一系列政策措施，支持區內金融發展。於6月，人民銀行、金管局與澳門金融管理局（澳門金管局）聯合宣布決定實施跨境「理財通」。金管局一直與內地和本地當局以及業界緊密合作，制定有關實施細則。金管局亦就其他措施與內地當局保持聯繫，尋求為香港銀行擴大政策空間拓展更廣闊的跨境業務範疇。年內，香港繼續保持作為全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐的地位。香港的人民幣即時支付結算(RTGS)系統平均每日交易額創出1.2萬億元人民幣的新高。
mt_raw: The HKMA continues to strengthen financial support measures between Hong Kong and mainland cities in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area. Mainland authorities announced a series of policy measures supporting regional financial development. In June, the PBOC, HKMA, and Macao Monetary Authority jointly announced the implementation of the Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect. The HKMA has maintained close coordination with mainland and local authorities as well as the industry to finalize implementation details. The HKMA also maintains contact with mainland authorities regarding other measures to explore broader cross-border business opportunities for Hong Kong banks. Throughout the year, Hong Kong remained the leading offshore RMB business hub. The average daily transaction value of Hong Kong's RMB Real-Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) system reached a record high of RMB1.2 trillion.

mt_raw: The HKMA actively pursues new opportunities to enhance Hong Kong's financial platform competitiveness. mt_raw: In the central banking field, the HKMA holds leadership positions in multiple regional and international committees. For instance, the HKMA served as the chair of the Policy and Standards Subcommittee under the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision and the Financial Markets Working Group under the East Asia and Pacific Central Banks (EMEAP). src_raw: 香港金融基建的安全及有效運作，為香港的國際金融中心地位奠定穩固基礎。處理銀行同業交易的4個RTGS系統、債務工具中央結算系統（CMU系統）及香港交易資料儲存庫（香港儲存庫）在2020年達到100%的系統可供使用率，高於99.95%的目標水平。透過於內地兩個中央證券託管機構的帳戶，CMU系統繼續協助結算「債券通」北向通交易，以及替相關CMU系統成員持有內地債務證券。
mt_raw: The safe and efficient operation of Hong Kong's financial infrastructure provides a solid foundation for its status as an international financial center. Four RTGS systems handling interbank transactions, the Debt Instruments Central Clearing System (CMU), and the Hong Kong Trade Data Repository (Hong Kong Repository) achieved 100% system availability in 2020, exceeding the 99.95% target level. Through accounts with two mainland central securities depositories, the CMU system continues to facilitate settlements of northbound Bond Connect trades and hold mainland debt instruments for relevant CMU members.

terms: {'香港身份證號碼': 'Hong Kong Identity Card number'}
src_raw: 自2018年9月轉數快推出以來，已有35間銀行及12間儲值支付工具營運商加入，其中在2020年增加了5間銀行及1間儲值支付工具營運商。轉數快使用量亦穩步增長。截至12月31日，轉數快共錄得690萬個登記（圖1）。為方便市民收取由機構發出的款項，轉數快於12月6日起新增以香港身份證號碼作帳戶識別代號。引入這項功能後不足1個月已錄得超過110,000個登記。這項新功能並非用於個人對個人轉帳，只供已有收款人身份證號碼的機構發放款項（例如發放薪酬）之用。由於每名市民的身份證號碼都是獨一無二，市民利用香港身份證號碼作為帳戶識別代號，即使不提供銀行帳戶號碼都能夠確保準確收取款項。
mt_raw: Since the launch of FPS in September 2018, 35 banks and 12 stored-value facility operators have joined, with five additional banks and one stored-value facility operator joining in 2020. FPS usage has steadily grown. As of December 31, FPS recorded 6.9 million registered accounts (Figure 1). To facilitate citizens receiving payments from institutions, FPS added a feature allowing users to identify accounts using their Hong Kong ID card numbers starting December 6. Within less than a month of introducing this feature, over 110,000 registrations were recorded. This function is specifically designed for institutions to issue payments (such as salaries) to recipients with known ID card numbers, not for personal-to-person transfers. Since each citizen's ID card number is unique, using it as an account identifier ensures accurate receipt of funds without requiring a bank account number.

terms: {'交易量': 'transaction volume', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19'}
src_raw: 新冠病毒疫情及保持社交距離措施為使用電子支付服務帶來新動力。年內轉數快交易量增長尤其迅速（圖2），於2020年12月的平均每日交易量達505,000宗即時交易（涉及52億港元及9,500萬元人民幣），相當於2019年12月168,000宗的3倍，更是2018年10月轉數快推出首月的10倍。轉數快使用量增加，亦受惠於應用範圍逐步擴大，由最初主要用作個人對個人支付，逐步擴展至繳付帳單（包括政府帳單）、零售及商業支付。
mt_raw: The pandemic and social distancing measures created new momentum for electronic payment services. FPS transaction volumes grew particularly quickly (Figure 2), reaching an average of 505,000 real-time transactions per day in December 2020, involving HKD5.2 billion and RMB95 million. This equaled three times the 168,000 transactions in December 2019 and ten times the 50,000 transactions in October 2018 when FPS was launched. Increased FPS usage was also driven by expanding application scope, initially focused on personal-to-person payments, gradually expanding to bill payments (including government bills), retail, and commercial payments.

src_raw: 金管局與多個政府部門及銀行業一直合作，將轉數快的應用範圍由個人對個人支付，擴展至繳付帳單及其他商戶支付。政府於2019年11月起接受以轉數快繳付帳單，以推廣使用轉數快及便利市民。市民以支援轉數快的手機銀行或電子錢包掃描印於帳單上的二維碼，即可輕鬆繳付稅款、差餉及地租、水費及政府發出的一般繳費單。截至2020年12月經轉數快繳付政府帳單的交易達180萬宗，涉及22億港元。繼繳付政府帳單服務成功推出後，再有4個政府部門由2020年12月21日起接受在指定繳費櫃枱及自助服務機以轉數快二維碼繳費。政府亦正在探討於網上採用轉數快付款的安排。
mt_raw: The HKMA has continuously collaborated with multiple government departments and the banking industry to expand FPS usage beyond personal-to-person payments to include bill payments and other merchant payments. Starting in November 2019, the government accepted FPS for bill payments to promote its adoption and convenience for citizens. Citizens could easily pay taxes, rates, rents, water charges, and general government invoices by scanning QR codes on bills using mobile banking apps or e-wallets supported by FPS. By the end of 2020, there were 1.8 million transactions via FPS for government bills, amounting to HKD2.2 billion. After successfully launching the government bill payment service, four additional government departments started accepting FPS QR code payments at designated payment counters and self-service machines from December 21, 2020. The government is also exploring online FPS payment arrangements.

src_raw: 另一正面的發展是越來越多大小商戶採用轉數快以加強業務營運。支付商戶的交易在2020年12月急增至平均每日100,000宗，較2019年12月增加38倍轉數快普遍用作繳付帳單、應用程式內直接扣帳，以及進行其他網上購物。電子錢包日益普及，亦帶動了以轉數快為帳戶增值的交易量顯著增長。2020年12月平均每日增值的交易量，是2019年12月的7倍。
mt_raw: Another positive development is the increasing adoption of FPS by merchants of all sizes to enhance business operations. Merchant transactions via FPS surged to an average of 100,000 daily transactions in December 2020, a 38-fold increase compared to December 2019. FPS is commonly used for bill payments, direct deductions within applications, and other online shopping activities. The popularity of e-wallets has also led to a significant increase in transactions for topping up accounts via FPS. The average daily top-up transactions in December 2020 were seven times those in December 2019.

mt_raw: To raise public awareness of FPS, the HKMA produced educational materials and promotional content, including television advertisements and a series of tips on smart usage available on social media platforms. src_raw: 2020年是峰迴路轉的一年，新冠病毒疫情為全球經濟帶來前所未有的挑戰。資產市場於第1 季經歷了大幅調整和震盪後，在主要央行推出超寬鬆的貨幣政策及各地政府實施大規模的財政紓困措施帶動下，得以迅速反彈。由於主要央行大幅下調基準利率並重啟量化寬鬆措施，令國債收益率顯著下跌、債券價格上升。在此投資環境下，外匯基金在2020 年錄得2,358 億港元的投資收入，回報率為5.3%。
mt_raw: 2020 was a year marked by twists and turns, with the COVID-19 pandemic bringing unprecedented challenges to the global economy. After experiencing significant adjustments and volatility in the first quarter, the asset markets rebounded swiftly, driven by ultra-loose monetary policies implemented by major central banks and large-scale fiscal relief measures taken by governments around the world. Due to the substantial reductions in benchmark interest rates and the resumption of quantitative easing by major central banks, bond yields declined significantly, while bond prices increased. Under this investment environment, the Exchange Fund recorded investment income of HK$235.8 billion in 2020, with a return rate of 5.3%.

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產配置於較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的市值上限為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一，以及未來基金存款與外匯基金附屬公司存款中與長期增長組合掛鈎部分的總和。
mt_raw: To manage risks more effectively and enhance medium-to-long-term returns, the HKMA has gradually and prudently allocated part of the Exchange Fund's assets to diversified asset categories, including emerging markets and Mainland China bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure), and real estate. Emerging market and Mainland China bonds and equities are held within the Investment Portfolio, while private equity and real estate investments are held within the Long-term Growth Portfolio. The market value ceiling for the Long-term Growth Portfolio is one-third of the cumulative surplus of the Exchange Fund, combined with the total amount of future fund deposits and the portion of deposits from affiliated companies of the Exchange Fund linked to the Long-term Growth Portfolio.

src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置，會以投資基準方式反映，亦即外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，透過戰略性的資產配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內管理倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The investment process of the Exchange Fund is based on both strategic and tactical asset allocations. Strategic asset allocation is reflected in the form of an investment benchmark, i.e., the long-term asset allocation that the Exchange Fund can undertake to achieve its investment objectives. Guided by the strategic allocation, the Exchange Fund seeks to exceed the benchmark through a tactical asset allocation. Therefore, the actual allocation often deviates from the benchmark allocation (i.e., the strategic allocation). This deviation is referred to as the "tactical deviation." After consultation with the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, the Financial Secretary establishes the investment benchmark and tracking error limits, while the HKMA is authorized to determine the tactical asset allocation and set the permissible range for the tactical deviation. Investment portfolio managers can manage positions within the allowable range of the tactical deviation to profit from short-term market fluctuations.

src_raw: 投資環境越趨複雜，風險管理的重要性不言而喻。金管局為內部及外聘投資經理所管理的投資組合均訂下嚴格管控措施及投資指引，並設立嚴謹的風險監察及合規制度。金管局為投資相關活動設有三重防線以確保有效的風險管理及監察。金管局亦定期監察主要投資風險類別（包括信用、市場、流動性及業務操作風險），並已加強風險管理程序以配合外匯基金的多元化投資。
mt_raw: As the investment environment becomes increasingly complex, the importance of risk management cannot be overstated. The HKMA implements strict control measures and investment guidelines for both internally and externally managed investment portfolios and establishes rigorous risk monitoring and compliance mechanisms. The HKMA has set up three lines of defense for investment-related activities to ensure effective risk management and oversight. The HKMA regularly monitors major investment risk categories, including credit, market, liquidity, and operational risks, and has enhanced risk management procedures to align with the diversified investments of the Exchange Fund.

src_raw: 金管局訂有一套原則，以評估外匯基金投資項目的ESG風險與機會。就外聘投資經理所管理的資產組合而言，金管局透過獲委任的投資經理執行負責任投資。在甄選、委任及監察外聘投資經理的過程中，金管局會評估其落實ESG的不同範疇，包括ESG管治方面的組織架構、ESG標準及政策、將ESG因素併入投資程序中的情況，以及管理督導的業務活動，即代理投票和與投資組合公司的溝通（例如與投資組合公司管理層商討ESG的事宜）。為彰顯對負責任投資的重視，金管局透過外聘投資經理在管理督導方面扮演的角色，推動更完善的ESG做法。負責管理金管局的香港股票組合及中國內地股票主動投資管理組合的外聘投資經理，須承諾遵守證券及期貨事務監察委員會頒布的《負責任的擁有權原則》，若未能遵守則須作出解釋。至於負責管理已發展市場股票組合的外聘投資經理則需恪守國際公認的ESG標準。此外，金管局又展開聘任後監察計劃，以審視外聘投資經理的代理投票及與投資組合公司溝通的落實概況。
mt_raw: The HKMA has established a set of principles to assess the ESG risks and opportunities associated with the Exchange Fund's investment projects. Regarding the assets managed by external investment managers, the HKMA entrusts these managers to implement responsible investing. In the selection, appointment, and oversight of external investment managers, the HKMA evaluates their implementation across different ESG dimensions, including organizational structures for ESG governance, ESG standards and policies, integration of ESG factors into investment processes, and oversight of business activities, namely proxy voting and communication with portfolio companies (such as discussions with portfolio company management on ESG matters). To emphasize the importance of responsible investing, the HKMA leverages the role of external investment managers in overseeing governance to promote improved ESG practices. External investment managers responsible for managing the HK stock portfolio and active investment management of Mainland China stocks must commit to complying with the Securities and Futures Commission's "Principles for Responsible Ownership"; failure to comply necessitates an explanation. For external investment managers handling developed market stock portfolios, adherence to internationally recognized ESG standards is required. Furthermore, the HKMA has initiated post-appointment monitoring programs to review the actual implementation of proxy voting and communication with portfolio companies by external investment managers.

src_raw: 至於在公開市場的ESG投資，金管局自2015年起投資於綠色、社會責任及可持續債券（ESG債券），是這個市場的早期投資者之一。此外，金管局亦參與國際金融公司的「聯合貸款組合管理計劃」，而其投資對象聚焦於新興市場的可持續發展項目。在2020年，適逢市場供應增加，金管局增加ESG債券的投資。展望未來，金管局將繼續透過直接投資或持有ESG債券基金等方式，壯大其ESG債券組合。此外，金管局將透過採納ESG股票指數作為被動投資組合的投資基準，推動外聘投資經理建立以ESG為主題的股票投資方針。金管局在未來幾年將會繼續留意以ESG為主題的投資機會，例如主動式的ESG投資組合及低碳為題的投資工具。
mt_raw: Regarding ESG investments in public markets, the HKMA has been an early investor in green, socially responsible, and sustainable bonds (ESG bonds) since 2015. Additionally, the HKMA participates in the International Finance Corporation's "Joint Loan Portfolio Management Programme," with investment targets focused on sustainable development projects in emerging markets. In 2020, amid an increase in market supply, the HKMA increased its ESG bond investments. Looking ahead, the HKMA will continue to expand its ESG bond portfolio through direct investments or holdings of ESG bond funds. Furthermore, the HKMA will encourage external investment managers to establish ESG-focused stock investment strategies by adopting ESG stock indexes as benchmarks for passive investment portfolios. The HKMA will continue to monitor ESG-themed investment opportunities in the coming years, such as actively managed ESG portfolios and low-carbon investment tools.

src_raw: 私募市場投資方面，金管局在盡職審查過程中檢視專責合夥人的ESG政策及具體措施。金管局的長期增長組合積極投資於具備可持續特點的項目，包括可再生能源基建，而在房地產投資組合亦有吸納具有綠色及可持續特點的倉庫及其他建築物。金管局將在未來繼續物色具備可持續特點的項目，並在房地產投資方面將綠色認證列入為重要考慮因素。金管局與專責合夥人舉行年度ESG工作坊，就良好的ESG作業手法交流意見及經驗。在11月舉行的ESG工作坊上，一眾專責合夥人就新冠病毒疫情對其投資組合公司及ESG投資發展所造成的影響交換意見。為提高私募市場投資的ESG透明度，金管局已要求專責合夥人提供有關其投資項目的ESG資訊，例如氣候變化風險等，以便監察。
mt_raw: In private market investments, the HKMA reviews the ESG policies and specific measures of dedicated partners during due diligence. The HKMA's Long-term Growth Portfolio actively invests in projects with sustainability characteristics, including renewable energy infrastructure, and incorporates green and sustainable warehouses and other buildings into its real estate investment portfolio. The HKMA will continue to seek out projects with sustainability features and will incorporate green certifications into important considerations for real estate investments. The HKMA conducts annual ESG workshops with dedicated partners to exchange ideas and experiences on good ESG practices. At the ESG workshop held in November, participating dedicated partners discussed the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on their portfolio companies and ESG investment developments. To improve transparency of ESG information in private market investments, the HKMA requires dedicated partners to provide ESG information on their investment projects, such as climate change risks, for monitoring purposes.

src_raw: 金管局往後仍會密切觀察ESG標準的發展，評估如何將有關標準進一步融入投資程序，當中包括與理念相近的投資者及國際組織互動合作。金管局作為聯合國支持的《負責任投資原則》的簽署人之一，肩負作為全球倡導者的責任，日後將會參與制定ESG最佳作業手法，並推動其他投資者採納負責任的投資方法。金管局亦是非牟利機構 FCLTGlobal 的成員，該機構旨在透過舉辦工作坊及研究，鼓勵以長遠目標為本的業務及投資決策。金管局亦有參與「氣候相關財務資訊披露工作小組」，並為「央行與監管機構綠色金融網絡」的成員。此外，金管局籌辦講座及積極參與投資業界舉辦的活動，分享及推廣有關ESG投資的理念。
mt_raw: The HKMA will continue to closely monitor developments in ESG standards and evaluate how to further integrate these standards into investment processes, including collaborations with like-minded investors and international organizations. As a signatory of the United Nations-supported Principles for Responsible Investment, the HKMA bears the responsibility of a global advocate and will participate in setting ESG best practices, promoting other investors to adopt responsible investment approaches. The HKMA is also a member of the non-profit organization FCLTGlobal, which encourages long-term-oriented business and investment decisions through workshops and research. The HKMA participates in the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures and is a member of the Central Banks and Supervisors Network for Green Finance. Additionally, the HKMA organizes lectures and actively participates in industry events to share and promote ESG investment concepts.

src_raw: 因應受新冠病毒疫情為全球經濟帶來的重大挑戰而推出的寬鬆貨幣及財政政策支持下，環球金融市場在年底時升至高位。環球股票市場於第1季經歷了大幅調整和震盪後迅速反彈，主要市場更錄得雙位數字的增長。美國標準普爾500指數上升16%，是2020年表現最佳的七大工業國股票指數。
mt_raw: Under the support of loose monetary and fiscal policies launched in response to the significant challenges posed by the COVID-19 pandemic to the global economy, global financial markets reached high levels by year-end. After experiencing significant adjustments and volatility in the first quarter, global stock markets rebounded rapidly, with major markets recording double-digit growth. The S&P 500 Index in the United States rose by 16%, making it the best-performing major industrial country stock index in 2020.

src_raw: 除金管局《年報》外，年內金管局出版兩期《貨幣與金融穩定情況半年度報告》及4期《季報》，並定期更新《金融數據月報》資料，提供有關香港貨幣、銀行業及經濟事務的最新及專題資料與分析。此外，金管局共發表18篇《匯思》文章，介紹金管局的重要措施及政策，並討論公眾關注的事項。

src_raw: 金管局資訊中心設於國際金融中心2期55樓，向公眾介紹金管局工作及提高公眾對貨幣與銀行業事宜的了解。資訊中心分為展覽館及圖書館兩部分。展覽館以互動方式介紹金管局的工作，以及香港貨幣與銀行業的發展；另備資料與展品，供研究香港貨幣、銀行業與金融事務。毗鄰展覽館的圖書館收藏超過26,000本書籍、期刊及其他刊物，以供研究香港貨幣、銀行業、金融和中央銀行事務等課題。圖書館亦備存《銀行業條例》第20條規定的「認可機構及本地代表辦事處紀錄冊」及「認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊」。
mt_raw: The HKMA Information Centre is located on the 55th floor of International Finance Centre Phase II, offering the public insights into HKMA's work and raising public awareness of monetary and banking matters. The centre consists of an exhibition hall and a library. The exhibition hall uses interactive displays to introduce HKMA's work and the development of Hong Kong's monetary and banking sectors, along with materials and exhibits for research on Hong Kong's monetary, banking, and financial affairs. Adjacent to the exhibition hall, the library houses over 26,000 books, journals, and periodicals for research on Hong Kong's monetary, banking, financial, and central banking affairs. The library also keeps the "Registered Institutions and Local Representative Offices Register" and "Registered Institution Securities Business Staff Register" required under Section 20 of the Banking Ordinance.

terms: {'公積金': 'provident fund scheme', '浮動薪酬': 'variable pay', '金管局': 'HKMA'}
src_raw: 財政司司長透過外匯基金諮詢委員會聽取其轄下管治委員會的意見，並參考市場薪酬水平及做法，決定金管局員工的薪酬及服務條件。薪酬組合包括現金薪酬及公積金，另設一些基本福利。現金薪酬包括每月固定薪酬（即基本薪酬）及根據員工工作表現每年一次過發放的浮動薪酬。
mt_raw: The Financial Secretary, upon receiving recommendations from the governing committee under his jurisdiction, considers market compensation levels and practices to determine the salary and service conditions of HKMA employees through the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee. Compensation packages include cash compensation and mandatory provident fund contributions, plus some essential benefits. Cash compensation comprises monthly fixed remuneration (i.e., base salary) and variable remuneration paid once a year based on employees' performance.

src_raw: 財政司司長每年檢討金管局員工薪酬時，會透過外匯基金諮詢委員會聽取其轄下管治委員會的建議，並考慮管治委員會對金管局過去一年的表現評估、獨立人力資源顧問公司進行的金融業薪酬調查結果，以及其他相關因素。個別工作表現優秀的員工的薪酬亦可能獲得特別調整，以作獎勵及保持其薪酬競爭力。
mt_raw: When reviewing HKMA employees' salaries annually, the Financial Secretary seeks recommendations from the governing committee under his jurisdiction through the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, taking into account the governing committee's assessment of HKMA's performance over the past year, results from independent human resources consultancy firms' financial sector compensation surveys, and other relevant factors. Individual employees who demonstrate exceptional performance may receive special adjustments to their compensation to reward them and maintain competitiveness.

terms: {'浮動薪酬': 'variable pay', '總裁': 'Chief Executive', '金管局': 'HKMA'}
src_raw: 金管局按個別員工的工作表現，分配獲批准用作調整年度固定薪酬及浮動薪酬的款項；而適用於負責投資的員工的浮動薪酬制度，則旨在加強其投資表現與薪酬的連繫。助理總裁及以上職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，是由財政司司長經參考管治委員會的意見後批准，有關員工在會議討論到其薪酬的議案時會避席。主管及以下職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，則由金管局總裁根據財政司司長授權，按照獲批准用作支付薪酬的整筆款項來決定。
mt_raw: HKMA allocates approved funds for adjusting annual fixed and variable remuneration based on individual employees' performance. The variable remuneration scheme applicable to employees managing investments aims to link their investment performance with compensation. Fixed remuneration adjustments and variable remuneration payments for Assistant Chief Executives and above are approved by the Financial Secretary after considering the governing committee's input. Employees involved in discussions on their own salary proposals will be excluded from the meeting. <responsible_investments>
The HKMA supports responsible investing, which integrates environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors into investment activities. As a significant asset owner, the HKMA increasingly focuses on responsible investing, influencing how its fund managers conduct investment activities.
</responsible_investments>
<hkma_beliefs>
The HKMA believes that emphasizing responsible investing and considering the sustainable long-term performance of investments will be more effective in achieving the investment objectives of the Exchange Fund, as well as reducing ESG-related risks associated with investment activities.
</hkma_beliefs>
<hkma_principles>
According to the guiding principles adopted by the HKMA, ESG investments are generally preferred when they offer similar risk-adjusted long-term returns compared to other investment options. As a responsible long-term investor, the HKMA adopts the following responsible investment principles in its investment management process based on circumstances:
</hkma_principles>
<integration>
The HKMA believes that ESG factors significantly impact the long-term value of investment projects and therefore integrates ESG factors into the investment analysis process to identify risks and seize opportunities. The HKMA incorporates ESG factors into both public market and private market investment management processes.
</integration>
<active_exercise_of_asset_ownership>
The HKMA exercises shareholder rights properly regarding its holdings of listed company stocks to safeguard the long-term value of investments. The HKMA believes that responsible corporate behavior considering ESG factors helps create long-term shareholder value. The HKMA expects external fund managers to proactively exercise asset ownership by voting and communicating with invested companies, thereby assisting the HKMA in fulfilling its ownership responsibilities towards investment projects.
</active_exercise_of_asset_ownership>
<collaboration>
The HKMA is committed to cooperating with like-minded investors and regulators to promote sound long-term investment management practices. It participates in public events and delivers speeches, sharing improved ESG practices and encouraging the investment community to adopt responsible investment principles.
</collaboration>
<hkma_as_an_active_responsible_investor_monitoring_its_external_managers_esg_practices>
<expectations>
The HKMA places great importance on concepts such as integrating ESG factors into investment decisions and actively exercising asset ownership. Therefore, the HKMA considers ESG factors when selecting and monitoring external fund managers. Given that the HKMA views the exercise of shareholder rights over its holdings of listed company stocks as a fundamental strategy for safeguarding long-term investment value, it requires appointed fund managers to take active shareholder engagement seriously.
</expectations>
<monitoring>
External fund managers must undergo assessments of their ESG performance regarding the publicly traded stock portfolios managed for the HKMA. Through a communication program, the HKMA systematically reviews the ESG practices of external fund managers across different areas, such as their ESG evaluation frameworks, communication with invested companies, and proxy voting activities. In 2020, the HKMA selected several external fund managers to participate in the communication program, assessing not only their ESG performance but also whether they effectively represented the HKMA in exercising asset ownership.
</monitoring>
<communication_outcomes>
The HKMA identified external fund managers with problematic practices through the program and took follow-up actions. The following examples illustrate two cases:
</communication_outcomes>
<case_1>
